entities.name: Hydrogen Principle
entities.context: Strategic focus on identifying the most fundamental, irreducible component of a system - the 'Hydrogen' that drives all other complexity

entities.name: First-principles thinking
entities.context: Reasoning approach that strips away emergent properties to identify core drivers of a phenomenon

entities.name: Modular design
entities.context: Design principle where optimizing the base module increases entire system reliability proportionally

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company where identifying the core hireable data point would provide highest leverage

entities.name: Strategic drift
entities.context: Failure mode where effort is spent on variations ('isotopes') that don't change fundamental problem chemistry

relationships.context: Both focus on identifying and optimizing the most basic, foundational unit
Share the principle that optimizing foundational elements improves the whole system
Should apply principle to identify core data point that makes candidates hireable
Strategic drift is the failure mode when the Hydrogen Principle is not applied
